seed_instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings.
org_constraint: The response must contain exactly 8 sentences, with the first paragraph containing exactly 3 sentences and the second paragraph containing exactly 5 sentences.
new_constraint: The response must contain three paragraphs.
instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings. The response must contain exactly 8 sentences, with the first paragraph containing exactly 3 sentences and the second paragraph containing exactly 5 sentences. The response must contain three paragraphs.
response:
The team will begin Monday with a kickoff meeting to define the feature requirements. Tuesday and Wednesday are dedicated to intensive coding and backend development. Thursday will focus on initial unit testing and bug identification.

Friday is reserved for peer code reviews and final integration tests. The team will meet on Monday morning to review the previous week's progress. Developers will spend the rest of the week refining the user interface. Quality assurance engineers will perform stress tests on the new module. The week concludes with a final demo to stakeholders.<turn|>
judged_response:

Developers will spend the rest of the week refining the user interface. Quality assurance engineers will perform stress tests on the new module. The week concludes with a final demo to stakeholders.
